name: lock file expires field is enforced as an upper bound on lock holding to guard against crashed holders
command: printf '{"_locks":{"rubric":{"holder":"pid-dead","expires":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}}}\n' > lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-lock.sh" --lock lock.json --check expired-locks --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'expired_lock=rubric' err.txt && grep -q 'holder=pid-dead' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
